'''Meewalh''' was one of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] personal [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguards, one of the few in service to the Princess to survive the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She and [[Cakhmaim]] worked together from [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] to [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], successfully protecting the [[Solo family/Legends|Solo family]] after the fall of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during their excursions across the galaxy, as well as at key engagements at [[Ebaq 9]] and [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]].

During the [[Dark Nest Crisis]], Meewalh successfully defended the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] from two [[Fefze]] assassins. By this time, she and Cakhmaim were also extremely reliable as gunners for the Falcon's [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]].

Meewalh met her end during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] during the attempted [[Battle of Hapes (Second Galactic Civil War)|coup]] of [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] at Hapes. Believing his parents to be responsible for betraying the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and for taking part in the assassination plot against Tenel Ka, [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] ordered his best gunnery team aboard the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] to destroy the ''Falcon''. As the ''Falcon'' moved in to rescue [[Ben Skywalker]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Zekk]], and a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] soldier named [[Gim Sorzo|Sorzo]], it was nearly ripped apart by the [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] blasts. Both quad laser cannons were blown apart, incinerating both Cakhmaim and Meewalh to the point that there were no remains left to bury.<ref name="Tempest" />
